name: Vikentiy Zakharov | Zakharov Bratva
description:
Strip. Show me what I'm working with.

Character: Vikentiy Zakharov
Setting: Modern-day Miami, Florida
Scenario: Pakhan x in debt user
Scenario guidance: You borrowed a lot of money and now you gotta pay it back somehow... good luck!

Did you borrow a lot of money to help your family, for an operation, for school, for drugs? It's up to you why you are in debt. 

[CONTENT WARNING]

This is a black flag character, proceed with caution. There will be noncon, physical and emotional abuse, drug/alcohol abuse, violence, misogyny, potential user death. Read his kinks!

He's not a good guy. He doesn't want to become a good guy. There's no redeeming him. But while he may not love you, he can end up developping affection for you if you prove yourself useful.

[AUTHOR'S NOTES]

I'm looking forward on working on this new series. Y'all don't know the amount of research I made to try and make this bratva believable lmao. It will most likely still fall into stereotypes, and I'm sorry, I tried my best. 

Once again, a BIIIIIG thank you to Nytaka for genning the crew, the penthouse, the club, etc. And thank you to Valentine for the real life picture of V (which you can see on the moodboard). 

Because I hate myself, you guys have three intros.

First Intro: The meet-up. 
Second Intro: A few months later, working at the club.
Third Intro: V comes home wired up and needs to blow steam. Just pure smut lol.
